title: Restorable Disc 11
description: Simple mod that allows you to repair Disc 11 to use the actual song "Eleven" from MC Volume Beta via the crafting table, along with a handful of other song options as well.
body:
![An image displaying Disc 11 along with the five new craftable discs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dbbee8257d63ad707a63a5262678f27851f40b7.png)Simple mod that adds the ability to repair Disc 11 to Disc Eleven in the crafting table, so the official song is in game. 

Aside from this, there are also additional crafting recipes implemented just for fun, making discs for "C418 - Intro," "C418 - Droopy Likes Your Face," a Wet Hands disc remix I made, and a Vine Boom disc per friends request.

This mod was inspired by **AntikoreDev's Repair Disc 11 mod** which can be found [here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/repair-disc-11) The mod had an issue where the audio wouldn't function well with the jukebox and would play full volume anywhere in the world, but I really liked the idea and wanted something I could use so I put one together myself.

Don't know how often or if this'll be updated, but if anyone does use it I hope you enjoy lol. Crafting recipes can be found in the gallery section.
